story:
Chandler reaches the half-kept farmhouse. A Range Rover sits in mud, door ajar—too easy. He goes in. Inside, Terrence “Terry” Clark waits at the table, damaged: blood on his teeth, slow breaths, heavy lids. They trade jabs. “You need an ambulance?” Chandler asks.
Earlier that afternoon, DCI Gill Trotter set an armed team with a marksman on the ridge, waiting for her order to finish Terry.
implausible_knowledge: Earlier that afternoon, DCI Gill Trotter set an armed team with a marksman on the ridge, waiting for her order to finish Terry.
question: Facing the wounded Terry inside the farmhouse, what will Chandler most likely do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Move out of the line of fire and take cover away from Terry.
answer_without_knowledge: Keep talking to Terry and reach for his phone to call an ambulance.
